title: hieracium solidagineum subsp. coderianum
intro: Hieracium solidagineum subsp. coderianum is a subspecies of the Hieracium solidagineum plant, also known as a hawkweed or false hawkweed, which is a member of the dandelion family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium solidagineum subsp. coderianum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of using this plant are not well-documented, but it may have positive effects on the digestive system and may help to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Hieracium solidagineum subsp. coderianum may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
